title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 293.650 - Expenses of director and inspectors
text:
293.650.  Expenses of director and inspectors. — The director and mine inspectors shall be allowed actual and necessary expenses including office and clerical expenses for the division which together with all salaries shall be paid out of the general revenue and the mine inspection fund.
(L. 1959 S.B. 188 § 4, A.L. 1967 p. 383)
